items.title: Full Stack Engineer
description: Built and scaled AI-integrated full-stack systems using PHP (Laravel) across Ecommerce, Multivendor platforms, Transportation & Logistics systems, and business automation solutions.
Developed and optimized RESTful APIs and backend architectures ensuring high performance, scalability, and security.
Implemented AI-powered features including smart automation, chatbots, sentiment analysis, and real-time feedback processing.
Engineered enterprise systems such as CRM, HRM, WMS, Clinical, and Logistics platforms with advanced analytics, tracking, and automated reporting dashboards.
Integrated third-party services and APIs including Meta APIs, WhatsApp integrations, and external platforms for cross-platform communication and workflow automation.
Collaborated across teams to deliver end-to-end product development from system design and architecture to deployment and optimization.

items.title: Software Developer
description: Built backend systems using PHP (Laravel) focusing on clean architecture, scalability, and maintainability.
Designed and consumed RESTful APIs for seamless system integrations and service communication.

Delivered production-ready platforms including Ecommerce (restaurant ordering systems), social networking platforms, LegalTech platforms, and EdTech / school management systems (LMS, KPIs, grading systems).
Developed interactive event booth experiences with real-time systems, user engagement features, and immersive applications.
